reason_not_scored: This video is an educational/conference presentation and facility tour, not a trainee or expert performance of an FLS task. The content shows: (1) Multiple speakers at podium delivering lectures (Jane Eggerstedt, MD and Andrew Chesson, MD), (2) Facility tours and equipment demonstrations at LSU Health Shreveport, (3) Demonstrations of surgical instruments and simulator setups to an audience, (4) Exhibits and visualizations of FLS equipment, but NO actual timed performance of a standardized FLS task (Peg Transfer, Pattern Cut, Endoloop, Extracorporeal Suture, or Intracorporeal Suture). The video serves as promotional/educational content about surgical training programs rather than a scoreable performance.
